title: Marrow Bones and Caper Salsa

seo.title: Marrow Bones and Caper Salsa - Marinda Kook

html:
Ingredients

  • 24 lovely thick marrow bones
  • 65 ml capers, drained and roughly chopped
  • 125 ml Italian parsley, roughly chopped
  • 4 whole spring onions, thinly sliced, green stalk and all
  • 30 ml olive oil
  • 15 ml lemon zest, finely grated
  • 15 ml lemon juice
  • coarse salt and black pepper to taste
  • crisply toasted brown bread fingers

Method

Arrange the bones on a baking tray lined with baking paper and bake at 220 ºC for about 15 minutes or until the marrow is cooked through and starts pulling away from the bones. Make sure you take the bones out of the oven before the marrow starts bubbling out.

Mix the capers, parsley, spring onions, oil, lemon zest and juice. Season to taste and sprinkle over the marrow bones.

Makes about 4 – 6 starter portions with buttered toast fingers.

Easy!
